label: Skill directory git mv is the root mutation; 65+ internal files self-heal via relative paths but ~90 external command/YAML path references across 6 files must be updated atomically

Skill-advisor has THREE decoupled representations: TS aliases.ts+explicit.ts (16+ entries), Python skill_advisor.py (35+ entries), compiled skill-graph.json+regression fixtures (5+ entries). All must be updated atomically followed by advisor_rebuild+advisor_validate
Four runtime agent mirror files (.opencode, .claude, .codex, .gemini) each contain deep-agent-improvement frontmatter+body references; must be renamed concurrently with git mv of skill directory
Two deep-loop command .md files plus four YAML workflow assets carry ~90 hard-coded skill-path/name references; bulk find-and-replace needed across all six files
Skill-advisor graph-metadata.json enhances edge targets deep-agent-improvement; must be updated before advisor_rebuild runs
AGENTS.md line 349 carries agent routing entry naming deep-agent-improvement; one-line fix in root docs surface
Skill's own graph-metadata.json has 9 surfaces (skill_id, trigger_phrases, key_files, entities, source_docs); paths self-heal post-git-mv+reindex, skill_id and trigger_phrases need manual update

HARD GATE: Phase 002 (rename) MUST complete before Phase 003 (Lane C build). Building Lane C against old directory path then renaming requires full trace-normalization rebuild. Reverse ordering is possible but creates mandatory remediation phase with no offsetting benefit
